prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **XU10J4RS** (RFV) 2.0L 16V from the Citroën Xantia Activa or Peugeot 406 Coupé, featuring forged internals (Mahle pistons, Pankl connecting rods) and a custom billet crankshaft by **JE Motorsport** for 220+ HP with a 8,500 RPM redline. Pair with a **Sadev ST90 6-speed sequential gearbox** (FWD-specific) and a **Peloquin LSD** with 45% lockup for optimal power delivery.

Full **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Supersprint** with 4-2-1 equal-length headers (4-1 merge collector) and a **Remus Powerflow** rear silencer, tuned for the XU10J4RS’s torque curve. Include a **Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel** (lightweight, 8.5kg) and a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** with a **Tilton 7.25-inch aluminum flywheel** for rapid rev matching.

Custom **DTA S80 Pro ECU** standalone management with **Bosch Motorsport 0280158001** 850cc injectors, **NGK R8471-10** iridium spark plugs, and a **Turbosmart Kompact 40mm** blow-off valve (for future forced induction). Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (ZX-specific valving), **SuperPro polybushings** (full chassis refresh), and **Brembo GT 330mm front brake kit** (4-piston calipers, 30mm thick rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 ZX Aero Kit** (FRP construction, 3-piece front splitter, oversized rear diffuser, and GT-style canards) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** by **Seibon** (OEM+ fitment). Paint in **PPG Concept ‘Lime Sorbet’ (Code: 445)** with **3M Matte Black 1080 wrap** on the roof and pillars for contrast.

**OMP KS-2 racing seats** (carbon fiber shell, FIA 8855-1999 homologated) wrapped in **Alcantara ‘Rosso Corsa’** with **Sabelt 6-point harnesses**. Replace the OEM steering wheel with a **Momo Prototipo Evo** (330mm, suede) and install a **Defi BF Advance** digital dash (oil temp, oil pressure, wideband AFR) in a **custom carbon fiber gauge pod**.

**Work Meister CR Kiwami** 17x9 +38 wheels (ET38, 5x108 PCD) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (245/40 R17). Full **ZX-specific fender flares** by **KBD Body Kits** (widebody conversion, 50mm rear stretch) and **custom LED taillights** by **Luxx Lighting** (sequential turn signals, smoked lenses).
